subcodes.first_line: O thou who diffusest the fragrances of God! Thy services at the Sacred Threshold are evident and praiseworthy, and the confirmations from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ینشر نفحات الله خدمات آنحضرت در آستان مقدس مشهود و محمود و تاییدات از
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
